settings.heading: Where do I make an account?
settings.text: If you don't have an account, follow this link to get started!

settings.heading: How does the MLS reward work?
settings.text: Just click the 'Join Now' button to get started. Once you're registered with our store, you'll have the opportunity to take part in all of the exciting ways we currently offer to earn points!

settings.heading: How can I earn MLS Points?
settings.text: You can earn points by participating in any of our innovative promotions! Click on the 'Earn MLS Points' tab to view and take part in our current opportunities.

settings.heading: How do I check my points balance?
settings.text: Your points balance will show on this page; you can also see them on the account page.

settings.heading: How do I redeem my rewards?
settings.text: Points can be redeemed as a discount on this page 'Redeem Your Rewards'. Also, visit the 'REDEEM MLS REWARDS' tab on this page to view all of our great reward options and click the 'Redeem' button to redeem your reward.

settings.heading: Do my rewards expire?
settings.text: Once earned, your rewards will expire after 6 months. Your points will also expire after 6 months of inactivity.

settings.heading: How long will it take for points to post to my account?
settings.text: You should receive points in your account instantly once you complete a promotion!

settings.heading: What happens to my points if I make a return?
settings.text: When you return an item, you lose the associated credit you originally earned by buying the item in the first place.

settings.heading: How do I contact support if I have questions about my points?
settings.text: Our team is ready and waiting to answer your questions about our rewards program! Send us a quick message and we'll be in touch.

settings.heading: What if I don't want to receive promotional emails?
settings.text: From time to time, you'll receive program-related emails from us. If you'd prefer to not receive those types of emails anymore, just click the 'Unsubscribe' button.
